calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-12-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-12-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause assigned to Dept. 218 for Settlement Conference. Present: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Leticia Perez. Michael Lieberman, Esq. appeared for the Plaintiff and Defendant, Cassidy Blonksy appeared in pro per. Also present was Tony Davidauskis, Manager of Granada. The matter settled per stipulation of the parties on the record.
